explanation: This command uses character array encoding and Join-String to bypass the detection by avoiding explicit 'join' or 'char' in the command line.
This command uses ForEach-Object to convert ASCII codes to characters and joins them, avoiding direct use of [char[]] and 'join' in the command line.
This command uses base64 encoding to obfuscate the command, avoiding direct use of 'char' or 'join' in the command line.
This command uses base64 encoding and UTF8 decoding to obfuscate the command, avoiding direct use of 'char' or 'join' in the command line.
